ops.note: Promotion: cc_steer/retrain/watcher.py writes <run>/paired_comparison.json before judging with BOTH arms' per-row P(NO_STEER) on the frozen frame + full DeLong record (survives reject/judging failure); tests TestPairedComparisonArtifact::{test_promote_persists_both_arms_probs_and_delong_stats,test_reject_still_persists_the_comparison_and_reports_noise_not_loss}.
